content:
LIC Arogya Rakshak is LIC's standalone health insurance product - different from regular health insurance because it pays **fixed benefits** regardless of actual hospital bills.

## Fixed Benefit vs Reimbursement: Key Difference

Most health insurance (Star, Max Bupa, HDFC Ergo) reimburses your actual hospital bill. Arogya Rakshak is different: it pays a **fixed daily benefit** and **fixed surgical benefit** regardless of the actual expense. This means:

- Your hospital bill is Rs 80,000 - you get the fixed benefit (say Rs 50,000) regardless
- Your hospital bill is Rs 30,000 - you still get the full fixed benefit (Rs 50,000)
- You can combine it with regular health insurance - there is no deduction for other insurance

## Key Benefits of Arogya Rakshak

**Hospital Cash Benefit:**
Rs 1,500 to Rs 10,000 per day during hospitalisation (you choose the benefit level)

**Major Surgical Benefit:**
Flat payment for 884 listed surgical procedures - classified into 4 tiers (100%, 60%, 40%, 20% of annual benefit)

**ICU Benefit:**
Double the daily hospital cash rate during ICU admission

**Day Care Procedures:**
Lump sum for specified procedures not requiring 24-hour hospitalisation

**Ambulance Cover:**
Rs 1,000 per hospitalisation

## Who Should Buy Arogya Rakshak?

**Good for:**
- Self-employed, businessmen, daily wage earners who cannot afford income loss during hospitalisation
- Those with group health cover at work but no daily cash benefit
- Senior citizens who want supplementary income during hospitalisation (up to 65 years entry)

**Honest Limitation:**
Arogya Rakshak does NOT replace a proper indemnity health insurance plan. Cancer treatment costing Rs 15 lakh will not be covered by the fixed benefits. You must have a regular health insurance policy alongside it.

## Sample Premium

A 35-year-old taking daily benefit of Rs 3,000 and major surgical benefit of Rs 3 lakh:
- Approximate annual premium: Rs 6,000-8,000

For complete health protection: buy a family floater health policy (Star/HDFC Ergo) for hospitalisation bills, and add Arogya Rakshak for daily income and surgical support. Call Ajay Kumar Poddar at 9415313434 to build your health insurance stack.
contentHi:
LIC आरोग्य रक्षक एक फिक्स्ड बेनिफिट प्लान है - अस्पताल का बिल चाहे जो हो, निर्धारित राशि मिलती है। डेली हॉस्पिटल कैश ₹1,500-10,000/दिन, ICU में डबल।

यह नियमित हेल्थ इंश्योरेंस की जगह नहीं ले सकता। दोनों साथ लें - एक इंडेमनिटी पॉलिसी + आरोग्य रक्षक।

9415313434 पर कॉल करें।
